seo.description: Learn software development, QA, and DevOps from scratch to architect. AAA platform with universal design, decoupled verbalization, and zero cognitive fatigue.
seo.about: VortexSpira EdTech: IT Training with AAA Universal Design. Learn programming, software testing (QA), and DevOps without technological or cognitive barriers.

org.description: VortexSpira EdTech is an AAA Universal Design software engineering platform, created to train from scratch to architect. Through cognitive science and decoupled verbalization, it minimizes mental fatigue.
org.accessibilitySummary: Complies with WCAG AAA guidelines. Offers OpenDyslexic typography, adaptable spacing, forced high-contrast themes, vestibular protection through reduced animations, and decoupled verbalization with pauses for code assimilation.

catalog.name: VortexSpira EdTech Training Catalog
catalog.description: Immersive training in software development, quality assurance (QA), and cybersecurity. Offline-first PWA architecture.
